overview.short: Samangad is a hill fort in Kolhapur District, Maharashtra.
overview.description: Samangad is a hill fort in Kolhapur District, Maharashtra. It is 2,600 feet (790 m) above sea level. The fort is situated on the oval-shaped top of the hill. The eight-foot-high wall of the fort which encircled the hill top is still intact.

topPlaces.name: Halkarni
topPlaces.description: Halkarni is a city situated in the south west corner of Maharashtra, TK: Gadhinglaj Taluka, Kolhapur district - 416506, India. The population of Halkarni is around 9,000.

topPlaces.name: Mugruwadi
topPlaces.description: Mungurwadi is a town in Gadhinglaj Taluka of Kolhapur district in Maharashtra, India. In 2001 it had a population of 3,271, but as of 2011, it has a population of 12,199.

topPlaces.name: Harali
topPlaces.description: Haladi is a Town in Gadhinglaj Taluka Kolhapur district situated in the southwest corner of state Maharashtra, India. Harali is situated on banks of Hiranyakeshi river originated from the Great Amboli Ghats is about 7 km from Gadhinglaj towards south and 12 km from the second largest city Kadgaon in Gadhinglaj Taluka and just 2 km from Mahagaon, Gadhinglaj.

topPlaces.name: Mahagaon, Gadhinglaj
topPlaces.description: Mahagaon is a town in Gadhinglaj Taluka, Kolhapur district, situated in the southwest corner of the state of Maharashtra, India, on the banks of the Hiranyakeshi river. It is about 10 kilometres (6.2 mi) south of Gadhinglaj and 14 kilometres (8.7 mi) from the city of Kadgaon.

topPlaces.name: Gadhinglaj
topPlaces.description: Gadhinglaj ([ɡəɖᵊɦiŋɡləd͡z]) is a city in India in the Kolhapur district in the southwest corner of the state of Maharashtra, India. It is located on the banks of the river Hiranyakeshi.

topPlaces.name: Bellanki
topPlaces.description: Bellanki is a village in Belgaum district in the southern state of Karnataka, India.

items.note: Halkarni is a city situated in the south west corner of Maharashtra, TK: Gadhinglaj Taluka, Kolhapur district - 416506, India. The population of Halkarni is around 9,000.
Mungurwadi is a town in Gadhinglaj Taluka of Kolhapur district in Maharashtra, India. In 2001 it had a population of 3,271, but as of 2011, it has a population of 12,199.

Haladi is a Town in Gadhinglaj Taluka Kolhapur district situated in the southwest corner of state Maharashtra, India. Harali is situated on banks of Hiranyakeshi river originated from the Great Amboli Ghats is about 7 km from Gadhinglaj towards south and 12 km from the second largest city Kadgaon in Gadhinglaj Taluka and just 2 km from Mahagaon, Gadhinglaj.

Mahagaon is a town in Gadhinglaj Taluka, Kolhapur district, situated in the southwest corner of the state of Maharashtra, India, on the banks of the Hiranyakeshi river. It is about 10 kilometres (6.2 mi) south of Gadhinglaj and 14 kilometres (8.7 mi) from the city of Kadgaon.
Gadhinglaj ([ɡəɖᵊɦiŋɡləd͡z]) is a city in India in the Kolhapur district in the southwest corner of the state of Maharashtra, India. It is located on the banks of the river Hiranyakeshi.
Bellanki is a village in Belgaum district in the southern state of Karnataka, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Samangad?
faq.a: The best time to visit Samangad is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

The nearest airport is Belagavi Airport (42 km) and the nearest railway station is Vasco da Gama (Goa) (107 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Samangad?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Samangad at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Samangad?
faq.a: Stays in Samangad start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Samangad?
faq.a: The top attractions are Halkarni, Mugruwadi, Harali, Mahagaon, Gadhinglaj, Gadhinglaj.
